name: Frito-Lay Skylanders
description: The Frito-Lay Skylanders were part of a naming competition for picking a new Skylander set for Skylanders: Trap Team. These Skylanders were given names and backstories created by fans who were chosen as winners of the Frito-Lay Skylander naming competition. The names chosen for three Skylanders are High Five, Bat Spin, and Flip Wreck.
biography: High Five was declared the winner of the Frito Lay contest. Not only were the given names of both Bat Spin and Flip Wreck kept, the two Skylanders would remain playable in Trap Team.

story.content: The Frito-Lay Skylanders were part of a naming competition for picking a new Skylander set for Skylanders: Trap Team. These Skylanders were given names and backstories created by fans who were chosen as winners of the Frito-Lay Skylander naming competition. The names chosen for three Skylanders are High Five, Bat Spin, and Flip Wreck. High Five was declared the winner of the Frito Lay contest. Not only were the given names of both Bat Spin and Flip Wreck kept, the two Skylanders would remain playable in Trap Team.

trivia: The Frito-Lay Skylanders were part of a naming competition for picking a new Skylander set for Skylanders: Trap Team.
The names chosen for three Skylanders are High Five, Bat Spin, and Flip Wreck.
High Five was declared the winner of the Frito Lay contest.
Not only were the given names of both Bat Spin and Flip Wreck kept, the two Skylanders would remain playable in Trap Team.
gameplay: Gameplay involves the three winners of the Frito-Lay naming competition: High Five, Bat Spin, and Flip Wreck. All three characters are fully playable in Skylanders: Trap Team.
